mask_email deja rastro mínimo (a***@dominio) sin PII completa en logs. mask_email a***@dominio.

exercises.code:
def mask_phone(p: str) -> str:
    d = "".join(c for c in p if c.isdigit())
    return ("*" * max(0, len(d) - 2)) + d[-2:]
print(mask_phone("999000111"))
exercises.justification_from_packet: mask_email deja rastro mínimo (a***@dominio) sin PII completa en logs. Enmascara teléfono dejando últimos 2.

exercises.code: print("logs never contain raw API tokens or full PII")
exercises.justification_from_packet: mask_email deja rastro mínimo (a***@dominio) sin PII completa en logs. Prohibido loguear secretos/PII completa.

exercises.code:
import time
def fetch_with_retry(fail_times=2):
    attempts = 0
    while attempts <= fail_times:
        attempts += 1
        if attempts <= fail_times:
            print("TimeoutError attempt", attempts)
            time.sleep(0)  # backoff placeholder
            continue
        return "ok"
    return "fail"
print(fetch_with_retry())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Timeout de red puede reintentarse; ValueError de datos no. Timeout reintentable con backoff; demo de intentos.
Timeout de red puede reintentarse; ValueError de datos no. ValueError de datos no se reintenta.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Encadenar la causa en __cause__ sin perder contexto
